author: śrīla rūpa gosvāmī
verses:
paritoṣita⋅gopa⋅vadhū⋅paṭalaṁ
paṭalaṅghita⋅kāñcana⋅sāra⋅cayam
racayantam udāra⋅vilāsa⋅kalāṁ
sakalāñcita⋅pādam agādha⋅balam
dhavalaṁ nava⋅kīrti⋅kulair amitam
en_translation: He fully satisfies the groups of cowherd women. He surpasses heaps of pure gold in brightness. He performs wonderful, charming pastimes. His feet are worshiped by everyone, and He possesses immeasurable strength. He is pure and endless in His ever-new glories.
